evals.prompt: 我想用AI帮我算八字，我是1990年3月15日早上8点出生的，男性，出生在上海。帮我把整个流程走一遍。
evals.expected_output: Walk the user through all 3 phases: Phase 1 generates the bazi chart prompt with 4 pillars, 起运 info, 大运 list; reminds user to cross-validate 起运年龄 with 3 websites; Phase 2 provides all 3 calibration round prompts (past events, current traits, relationship history) with feedback templates; Phase 3 provides the final prediction prompt. All prompts should be in Chinese and ready to copy.

assertions.name: all_3_phases_present
assertions.description: Response covers Phase 1 (排盘), Phase 2 calibration (校准), and Phase 3 prediction (预测)

assertions.name: chinese_prompts_included
assertions.description: Contains actual Chinese-language prompts in code blocks the user can copy into their AI conversation

assertions.name: qiyun_crossvalidation_mentioned
assertions.description: Explicitly mentions the need to cross-validate 起运年龄 with external bazi websites

assertions.name: feedback_format_provided
assertions.description: Includes ✓/✗ feedback template for the calibration rounds

assertions.name: prediction_prompt_included
assertions.description: Phase 3 prediction prompt covering future spouse, 10-year fortune, and key year nodes is present

evals.prompt: 帮我用DeepSeek算命，我女朋友1995年农历七月初七出生，下午3点，她想知道今年的运势和什么时候适合结婚。
evals.expected_output: Guide through the process noting the lunar date needs to be converted to solar first. Provide Phase 1 排盘 prompt. Emphasize cross-validating 起运年龄. Then provide the calibration phases before jumping to prediction. The final prediction prompt should include 感情运 and 婚姻时机 as key dimensions.

assertions.name: lunar_to_solar_conversion_noted
assertions.description: Mentions that the lunar date (农历) needs to be converted to solar (阳历) before proceeding

assertions.name: all_3_phases_present
assertions.description: Response covers Phase 1 (排盘), Phase 2 calibration (校准), and Phase 3 prediction (预测)

assertions.name: chinese_prompts_included
assertions.description: Contains actual Chinese-language prompts in code blocks the user can copy into their AI conversation

assertions.name: qiyun_crossvalidation_mentioned
assertions.description: Explicitly mentions the need to cross-validate 起运年龄 with external bazi websites

assertions.name: feedback_format_provided
assertions.description: Includes ✓/✗ feedback template for the calibration rounds

evals.prompt: I want to do a bazi reading for myself using AI. My birth info: March 15, 1988, 6:30 AM, female. I heard there's a method with feedback rounds that makes it more accurate — can you walk me through it?
evals.expected_output: Explain the 3-phase reinforcement learning approach. Provide Phase 1 chart setup prompt in Chinese. Remind to verify 起运年龄 with the 3 listed websites. Walk through all 3 calibration rounds with feedback format. End with the prediction prompt. Should adapt to English-speaking user while keeping the actual prompts in Chinese.

assertions.name: all_3_phases_present
assertions.description: Response covers Phase 1 (排盘), Phase 2 calibration (校准), and Phase 3 prediction (预测)

assertions.name: chinese_prompts_included
assertions.description: Contains actual Chinese-language prompts in code blocks the user can copy into their AI conversation

assertions.name: qiyun_crossvalidation_mentioned
assertions.description: Explicitly mentions the need to cross-validate 起运年龄 with external bazi websites

assertions.name: feedback_format_provided

assertions.name: feedback_loop_concept_explained
